name: Good as Gold Chicken. (Like KFC & Boston's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients (except chicken) in a saucepan and warm just to melt the honey.
2. Arrange the chicken breast-side-up in a square baking dish or pan.
3. Bake uncovered at 400 degrees for about 35-40 minutes, basting pieces without turning them 3 or 4 times during baking.
4. Immediately upon removing from the oven, seal the baking dish or pan tightly with foil and let stand 15 to 20 minutes before serving.
